name: ./motion/proc/free_cam
label: [Freefly Cam]
description:
A fully manual camera mode where you control position and
rotation directly. Move freely through the scene, orbit around
a point, or lock on to an actor for tracking.


## Movement

**Movement Damping** smooths camera position changes — lower
values make the camera more responsive, higher values add
inertia for cinematic ease-in/out.

**Use Orbit Move** switches from free-flight to orbit mode,
where the camera rotates around a point 1.5 m in front of it
instead of translating freely. Useful for circling a subject.

**Restrict Vertical Move** (VR platforms only) prevents
unintentional height changes by snapping small vertical offsets
back to ground level.


## Lock On Target

When **Lock On Target** is enabled the camera automatically
tracks the selected actor. **Tracking Mode** chooses which
body part to follow (center, head, or chest). **Target
Smoothing** and **Prediction** reduce lag and jitter in the
follow. **Auto Zoom** adjusts the field of view to keep the
target at a consistent screen size, with **FOV Height At
Target** controlling the desired apparent height. **Camera
Shake** adds subtle handheld-style motion scaled by tracking
lag. **Lock Rotation** makes the camera also follow the
target's orientation.


## Presets

Four built-in presets cover common setups: *Freefly* (full
manual control), *Lock On Actor* (track without zoom), *Lock +
Zoom Fullbody*, and *Lock + Zoom Upper Body* (tighter framing
on the torso).

values.name: Prediction
values.label: Prediction
values.description: Predict position of the target to reduce lag caused by smoothing

descriptions.ja: 平滑化による遅延を減らすためのターゲットの予測位置
descriptions.zh-TW: 預測目標位置以減少平滑度造成的延遲
descriptions.ko: 스무딩으로 인한 지연을 줄이기 위해 대상의 위치를 예측합니다
descriptions.zh-CN: 预测目标位置以减少平滑处理引起的延迟

labels.ja: ターゲットにロックオン

descriptions.ja: ターゲットに自動でフォーカス

values.name: Lock Rotation
values.label: Lock Rotation
values.description: Camera follows the rotation of the target

descriptions.ja: カメラがターゲットの回転を追従

values.name: Auto Zoom
values.label: Auto Zoom
values.description: Automatically zoom in and out to maintain the target size in view

descriptions.ja: ターゲットのサイズがビュー内で維持されるように自動でズームイン/アウト
descriptions.zh-TW: 自動放大和縮小以維持視野中的目標大小
descriptions.ko: 대상 크기를 보기 좋게 유지하기 위해 자동으로 확대/축소합니다
descriptions.zh-CN: 自动缩放，保持目标在视野中的大小

values.name: Zoom Speed
values.label: Zoom Speed
values.description: Time it takes to zoom to target FOV

descriptions.ja: ターゲットFOVにズームするのにかかる時間
descriptions.zh-TW: 變焦到目標視野所需時間
descriptions.zh-CN: 变焦到目标视场角所需时间

values.name: FOV Height At Target
values.label: FOV Height At Target

labels.ja: ターゲットにおけるFOV高さ

values.description: Vertical height for the target when using auto zoom

descriptions.ja: 自動ズームを使用する場合のターゲットの垂直高さ
descriptions.zh-TW: 使用自動變焦時目標的垂直高度
descriptions.ko: 자동 확대/축소 사용 시 대상의 수직 높이
descriptions.zh-CN: 使用自动变焦时的目标垂直高度

descriptions.ja: 垂直方向にオフセット

values.name: Use Orbit Move
values.label: Use Orbit Move

labels.ja: オービット移動を使用する

values.description: Enable or disable orbit movement, allowing the camera to rotate around a central point.

descriptions.ja: オービット移動の有効/無効を切り替える。カメラが中心点を周回するように回転します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 啟用或禁用軌道移動，允許攝影機圍繞中心點旋轉。
descriptions.ko: 오빗 이동을 활성화 또는 비활성화하여 카메라가 중심점을 중심으로 회전할 수 있게 합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 启用或禁用轨道运动，允许相机围绕中心点旋转。
